'''noharaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wacky|wacky]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-h-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wacky|wacky]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| noharaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:noharithi|noharithi]] || [[word:nohariji|nohariji]] || [[word:noharishi|noharishi]] || [[word:nohariki|nohariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:noharuthuthu|noharuthuthu]] || [[word:noharujuju|noharujuju]] || [[word:noharushushu|noharushushu]] || [[word:noharukuku|noharukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:noharuthu|noharuthu]] || [[word:noharuju|noharuju]] || [[word:noharushu|noharushu]] || [[word:noharuku|noharuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:noharufthuf|noharufthuf]] || [[word:noharufjuf|noharufjuf]] || [[word:noharufshuf|noharufshuf]] || [[word:noharufkuf|noharufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:noharethe|noharethe]] || [[word:nohareje|nohareje]] || [[word:nohareshe|nohareshe]] || [[word:nohareke|nohareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:noharothotho|noharothotho]] || [[word:noharojojo|noharojojo]] || [[word:noharoshosho|noharoshosho]] || [[word:noharokoko|noharokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:noharotho|noharotho]] || [[word:noharojo|noharojo]] || [[word:noharosho|noharosho]] || [[word:noharoko|noharoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:noharofthof|noharofthof]] || [[word:noharofjof|noharofjof]] || [[word:noharofshof|noharofshof]] || [[word:noharofkof|noharofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:noharÃŸfthÃŸf|noharÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:noharÃŸfjÃŸf|noharÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:noharÃŸfshÃŸf|noharÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:noharÃŸfkÃŸf|noharÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:noharÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|noharÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:noharÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|noharÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:noharÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|noharÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:noharÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|noharÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:noharÃŸfthÃŸf|noharÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:noharÃŸfjÃŸf|noharÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:noharÃŸfshÃŸf|noharÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:noharÃŸfkÃŸf|noharÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:noharÃŸfthÃŸf|noharÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:noharÃŸfjÃŸf|noharÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:noharÃŸfshÃŸf|noharÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:noharÃŸfkÃŸf|noharÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:noharÃḊthÃḊ|noharÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:noharÃḊjÃḊ|noharÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:noharÃḊshÃḊ|noharÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:noharÃḊkÃḊ|noharÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:noharathatha|noharathatha]] || [[word:noharajaja|noharajaja]] || [[word:noharashasha|noharashasha]] || [[word:noharakaka|noharakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:noharatha|noharatha]] || [[word:noharaja|noharaja]] || [[word:noharasha|noharasha]] || [[word:noharaka|noharaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:noharafthaf|noharafthaf]] || [[word:noharafjaf|noharafjaf]] || [[word:noharafshaf|noharafshaf]] || [[word:noharafkaf|noharafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:noharasha|noharasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:noharshÃḋsha|noharshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:noharosha|noharosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:noharmusha|noharmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:noharyasha|noharyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonoharnkshÃḋsha|gonoharnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonoharnkrosha|gonoharnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonoharnkmusha|gonoharnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonoharnkyasha|gonoharnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nohaharasha|nohaharasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nohaharshÃḋsha|nohaharshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nohaharosha|nohaharosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nohaharmusha|nohaharmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nohaharyasha|nohaharyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonohaharnkshÃḋsha|gonohaharnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonohaharnkrosha|gonohaharnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonohaharnkmusha|gonohaharnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonohaharnkyasha|gonohaharnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nehÃḊrasha|nehÃḊrasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nehÃḊrshÃḋsha|nehÃḊrshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nehÃḊrosha|nehÃḊrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nehÃḊrmusha|nehÃḊrmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nehÃḊryasha|nehÃḊryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonehÃḊrnkshÃḋsha|gonehÃḊrnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonehÃḊrnkrosha|gonehÃḊrnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonehÃḊrnkmusha|gonehÃḊrnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonehÃḊrnkyasha|gonehÃḊrnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nohfarasha|nohfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nohfarshÃḋsha|nohfarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nohfarosha|nohfarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nohfarmusha|nohfarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nohfaryasha|nohfaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonohfarnkshÃḋsha|gonohfarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonohfarnkrosha|gonohfarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonohfarnkmusha|gonohfarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonohfarnkyasha|gonohfarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
